issue_summary: Update some javadoc in the graph builders, add sample code. Run g4 fix on the files.
javadoc_before:
/** * A builder for constructing instances of {@link Network} with user-defined properties. * *

A graph built by this class will have the following properties by default: *

    *
  • does not allow parallel edges *
  • allows self-loops *
  • orders {@code nodes()} and {@code edges()} in the order in which the elements were added *
* * @author James Sexton * @author Joshua O'Madadhain * @since 20.0 */
javadoc_after:
/** * A builder for constructing instances of {@link MutableNetwork} with user-defined properties. * *

A network built by this class will have the following properties by default: * *

    *
  • does not allow parallel edges *
  • allows self-loops *
  • orders {@link Network#nodes()} and {@link Network#edges()} in the order in which the elements * were added *
* *

Example of use: * * 


 * MutableNetwork network =
 *     NetworkBuilder.directed().allowsParallelEdges(true).build();
 * network.addEdge(1, 2, "1->2");
 * network.addEdge(1, 2, "1->2 other");
 *
* * @author James Sexton * @author Joshua O'Madadhain * @since 20.0 */
